extensionDescription.message: Craft your personal newsletter with AI

extensionUpdatedError.message: Extension updated. Please reload the page (F5).

noTweetsFound.message: No tweets found on the current screen.

apiKeyRequiredDesc.message: You need to set up a Cloud LLM API Key (like Google Gemini) to start distilling.

readyToPublishDesc.message: Click the button below to curate your timeline into a personalized edition.

optionsSubtitle.message: Configure your personal Xpaper AI settings.

providerSettingsDesc.message: Select your preferred AI Provider. The default is Google Gemini API.

nanoReady.message: Local Nano model is available and ready for inference.

nanoNotReady.message: Please ensure Chrome Built-in Model features are enabled in chrome://flags.

grokRedirectDesc.message: Opens X's Grok AI in a new tab to process content. Limited to ~15 posts due to URL length constraints.

customApiUrlDesc.message: The full ChatCompletion Endpoint URL (e.g. OpenRouter, LM Studio).

localIPPermissionDesc.message: Local IP addresses require explicit permission to be accessed over HTTP.

modelNameDesc.message: The specific model to use for inference. You can overwrite this to use other versions (e.g. gemini-2.5-pro).

maxTweetsDesc.message: Reduce this number to speed up distillation testing, or increase it for deeper context.

grokRedirectNote.message: Opens X's Grok AI in a new tab with your timeline content. Free to try (no API key required).

grokRedirectLimitNote.message: Note: Limited to ~15 posts due to URL length constraints.

promptPlaceholder.message: Instruct the AI how to format and filter the information...

promptDesc.message: Customize how the AI evaluates and reformats extracted text. E.g., "Summarize in 3 bullet points, output as JSON."

sourceTargetsDesc.message: Xpaper only processes content explicitly targeted for distillation to keep operations safe and intentional.

sourceTargetHelp.message: Navigate to an X.com page and use the extension popup to extract content safely without background scraping.

httpsRequired.message: For security reasons, custom API URLs must use HTTPS (localhost exceptions apply).

decryptFailed.message: Failed to decrypt API key. Please re-enter your key in Options.

extensionUpdatedReload.message: Extension was updated. Please reload (F5) the X.com tab.

chromeAiNotAvailable.message: Chrome Built-in AI is not available or failed to generate text. Please ensure it is enabled in chrome://flags.
